title: Login Chat
description: A mod that sends chat messages when you join the server
body:
![Environment: Client](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-client-blue)
![Minecraft: 1.21.2](https://img.shields.io/badge/minecraft-1.21.2-blue)
![Loader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric-yellow)
## Overview
A utility mod that sends the chat messages, specified in the configuration file, automatically when joining the server. Yup, that's it, nothing else.

## Dependencies
[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) is required. [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is supported, although is not required to run the mod.

## Potential use cases
This mod was created because the author was tired of disabling the settings on the server that don't persist across the sessions (such as McMMO ability command). The mod could also be used for the automatic greetings, logging in to the servers that require that, etc. Be careful not to send too much messages though!
